comments.text: WOW, what an unbelievable song... Depression is real, anxiety is real.. its okay to be down.. but please, please just don't stay there... Tomorrow needs you... yes you... ALL OF US, keep fighting.
comments.author: @bhamthelyricist5723

comments.text: Whoever reads this:    keep goin....you matter. 🫶🏼
comments.author: @IllIlIllIIIlI

comments.text: Everyone who reads this, we don't know each other and probably never will but I wish you all the best in life and all the luck in the world 💖
comments.author: @CountryHitsCollection6688

comments.text: To all the people out there waking up and fighting every day like me, I respect you more than any man out there. People truly don’t understand the silent battles and how much they wear on your soul. I’m tired but I will get back up and keep moving.
comments.author: @drex8595
